description.value: This spell functions like protection from evil, except that the deflection and resistance bonuses apply to attacks made by good creatures. The target receives a new saving throw against control by good creatures and good summoned creatures cannot touch the target. Protection from Good, Communal This spell functions like protection from good, except you divide the duration in 1-minute intervals among the creatures touched.
